testcase.name: verifyProductsCountFromSearchBoxField

error.message: Cannot locate option with text: productLimitone For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.35.0', revision: '1c58e5028b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.3' Driver info: driver.version: unknown
